title: I’ve been running a small weekly newsletter for 5 years. This year I started publishing it in English too. I share things I learn in tech, useful tools, how I use AI in daily work, and bits of life from a Chinese engineer’s perspective. Latest issue: https://weekly.tw93.fun/en/posts/260

Post title: I’ve been running a small weekly newsletter for 5 years. This year I started publishing it in English too. I share things I learn in tech, useful tools, how I use AI in daily work, and bits of life from a Chinese engineer’s perspective. Latest issue: https://weekly.tw93.fun/en/posts/260
